feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Apps
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Apps Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How can I deploy my completed SAP Build Apps web application to the SAP C4C System?
entry.content:
I have created a web application in SAP Build Apps using the SAP C4C system OData. Now it is completed.
How can I deploy the Build Apps project to the C4C system to make it available to end users? SAP Build Apps 

 

BR Srimathy

entry.title: SAP Build showing network issue when calling post call
entry.content:
Hi ,

I was trying my hands at SAP build apps and  I was accessing backend OData call. It gives me a network issue in mobile app. It went well when testing it from integration test and indicated possibility of CORS issue.

I have added "Access-Control-Allow-Origin" in the request and set RZ10 parameter "icf/cors_enabled" as 1. 

Anything else I can do get rid of network issue.

regards,

Gaurang

entry.title: Hi all "error": "IAS authentication is not 'ias'. It is: xsuaa. implementing the Build apps.
entry.content:
Hi all 

I am developing an sap build app mobile application. I had done all the Instances and Subscriptions to my project. when I go to sap build lobby and to open the project, getting error that 

 "error": "IAS authentication is not 'ias'. It is: xsuaa.

in btp cockpit security->users-> i found custom IAS tenent and checked all are ok but still getting the same error can any one help me to out.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps: REST API Detail Page: Unexpected '?0=' Query Parameter Issue
entry.content:
Builders,

I'm encountering an issue while setting up a detail page using a REST API. I've configured a Data Variable that relies on a Page Parameter passed from the previous page to populate a Query Parameter for the API.

The API functions correctly in Postman, supporting all CRUD operations. Specifically, retrieving a single entry via GET requires a URL like:

https://*********.accounts.ondemand.com/scim/Users/62f75cbf-0b3a-40b6-9b326-e8c203426

However, when Build Apps constructs the URL, it appends ?0=, resulting in:

 

This additional ?0= seems to be causing the API to return all records instead of the specific record identified by the Page Parameter. I've confirmed this behavior by manually constructing the same URL in Postman.

My Questions:

  1. Is there a workaround to prevent Build Apps from appending ?0= to the URL?
  2. Alternatively, are there other methods to filter the results on the detail page to display the correct record, given that this is a REST API (not OData)?

I've observed that most detail page examples utilize OData, which might have different handling. Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: The OData or EDMX specification file was not found at the destination
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
I'm encountering an issue when trying to connect to an OData service in SAP. The error message I'm getting is:

"The OData or EDMX specification file was not found at the destination."

I can see this issue when trying to add a new action using the OData integration. 

I’ve already checked the destination configuration in SAP BTP and verified the URL.

 

Has anyone faced this issue before? What could be the possible reasons or steps to resolve it?

Any help or guidance would be appreciated.
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: CORS and Access-Control-Allow-Origin in SAP Build APPS when I try to call SAP ABAP cloud odata
entry.content:
Dear Community 

I'm working on implementation of SAP Build Apps application low code based on ABAP on cloud odata service . 

I have created the destination in SAP BTP destination as follows : 

And I have tried to make a get call over this destination as follows : 

Unfortunatly I'm blocked and it does not work : 

I tried many workaround and it does not work . 

 

And samething when I used basic authentification it does not work . 

 

your urgent help is highly appreciated

entry.title: Failed to load the logic canvas
entry.content:
Hi fellow builders,

I am facing weird issue since last few days. I am using trial account and followed these steps:

1 - I have created a SAP Build Apps - visual cloud functions by selecting Application Backend.

2 - I created one data entity - Customer with following attributes. Saved and deployed successfully:


 3 - I am trying to create a function, saved it and no issues so far.

4 - When I click on + and create record and select customer entity as below. Any idea why it is happening? Thanks in advance

The following error occurs and the editor crashes and not allowing me to proceed. 

Regards

Abhi

entry.title: SAP Dealer Business Management Road map to ECC to S4 Hana migration
entry.content:
Hi All,

I just want to know what the steps or guidelines involved are while migrating the system from ECC to S4HANA for SAP SD & DBM (dealer business management). If anyone has any notes for SAP DBM (Dealer Business Management), please share them to my email ID: pavanm5353@gmail.com

 

Regards,

Pavan Kumar M

entry.title: sub: i am destination error 500
entry.content:
hi experts,

i am getting error as 500 to this url - http://s4h2023gen.mydomain.com:8000/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SALES_ORDER_SRV

if you have faced this error please help me to solve this error

entry.title: SAP BUILD APPS PREVIEW DOES NOT LOAD IMAGE FOR CERTAIN PRODUCTS
entry.content:
HI EVERYONE,

Thanks a lot to SAP team & @DanielWe  for coming up with developers tutorial and beautifully explaining various topics, I wish we had this while learning ABAP 15 years before 😬. 

I'm building/running the tutorial on my Mac/Android phone & for one product images doesn't load(instead a default image is showing).

Product is - https://world.openfoodfacts.org/product/0722252183590/builder-s-protein

Analysis till now:

The Image url is getting pulled in text integration.

added one extra barcode as text on the app ( for analysis purpose to verify the barcode number is correctly fetched )

 

 

& below is the binding for image to home screen

below is how the app looks when scanning the bar code(incorrect )

 

2nd example (correct image pulled)

 

So my question is there is integration test feature to debug /test the api data, is there a similar feature for variable's of home screen or logging.

entry.title: getting csrf token validation error in build apps
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to create simple appl with sales order creation, i have added sales order service in integration through btp destinations attached screenshot for reference. 

But on clicking on create order the getting the CSRF token error. Is there anything i am missing. i thought this would have been auto taken care.

regards,
Narayan

entry.title: When creating a Work Order (WO) in Svc&AssetMgr, long titles display incorrectly
entry.content:
Description:
When creating a Work Order (portrait mode) in Svc&AssetMgr, long titles display incorrectly:

On tablets/iPads (Android/iOS):

 

On mobile devices (iOS/Android): 

Description:
We're observing inconsistent behavior of the '(Unassigned)' label display in Work Orders across different devices:

Attempted Solutions:
Tried adjusting the layout via MDK (Mobile Development Kit), but the inconsistency persists across platforms.

Question:
What alternative approaches could help standardize the display of long titles for all platforms?

entry.title: SAP BUILD importing .mtar file error
entry.content:
Hello,

We changed our plan from free to standard and we are importing our build apps projects. I am experiencing this error for 3 out of 6 projects that we have. I double checked and the project is not existing. I also tried creating a new project with the same name and I was able to create it and delete it.

I found one solution in google, but I don't have access to this link.

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-knowledge-base/workaround-for-error-importing-projects-in-sap-build-apps/ta-p/220085

Can anyone know what can we do to upload our projects? 

Thanks.

entry.title: "Date Field with input" control in build apps getting wrapped in a container
entry.content:
We are using this control "Date Field with input" in our Build app.

We have placed this control in a container along with some other fields. Now when i click on this control at runtime, it gets wrapped as shown below

One way i was able to get the entire month without getting anything from the calendar display wrapped is if we have enough controls below the date control, then automatically the main container size gets increased. And as a result it appears correctly as below.

Has anyone already faced this or has any pointers on this? Kindly help.

entry.title: Cant Download Base64 Files in SAP Build Apps on Mobile? It only take 1 min to do, Vote to Fix It!!
entry.content:
I’ve raised a feature request on the SAP Influence portal to enable Base64 file downloads in native mobile apps (Android/iOS) using SAP Build Apps. As of now, this functionality is only supported on web apps, which limits real-world mobile use cases like:

✅ Downloading PDFs, receipts, reports, CSVs on the go
✅ Offline access for field workers
✅ Handling file attachments directly from CAP/HANA Cloud responses
✅ Avoiding complex native plugin workarounds in a no-code/low-code platform

This improvement would allow smoother file handling from SAP Build Apps → CAP → mobile, making the ecosystem much more developer- and business-friendly.

📌 Please take a moment to upvote the request here:
👉 https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/346243

Let’s show SAP how much the community needs this!

💬 Feel free to drop your thoughts, use cases, or support in the comments below!

#SAPBuildApps #SAPBTP #SAPCAP #HANACloud #LowCode #MobileApps #SAPInfluence #FioriMobile #Base64Download #SAPCommunity SAP Build Apps

entry.title: Error while building app in App builder
entry.content:
Getting this error when trying to build my app, can anyone suggest why this is happening?

 

AB version: 3.18.2
COMMAND: 

USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16000 --no-experimental-global-navigator  npxrnv repackage-android -p android -s standalone_bundle -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn --offline --templates-path /orchestra-cache/4.12.236/ejected_templates --aapt2-path /app/aapt2/aapt2 

FAILED with ERROR: 

warn: You have integration @sba-runtime/integration-builder defined, but it wasn't found in package.json. ERR: Error: Cannot find module '../renative.json'
Require stack:
- ./node_modules/@sba-runtime/integration-builder/lib/config.js
- ./node_modules/@sba-runtime/integration-builder/lib/tasks/taskExport.js
- ./node_modules/@sba-runtime/integration-builder/lib/index.js
- ./node_modules/@rnv/core/lib/modules/index.js
Error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '/app/.appgyver/app/renative.private.json'
 at Object.openSync (node:fs:561:18)
 at Object.readFileSync (node:fs:445:35)
 at handleCryptoApiKeys (/app/current/buildHooks/dist/index.js:29381:56)
 at /app/current/node_modules/@rnv/core/src/buildHooks/index.ts:21:50
 at Object.dynatraceOnServiceExecutionIndicator [as doInvoke] (/opt/dynatrace/oneagent-paas/agent/bin/1.307.61.20250226-155505/any/nodejs/nodejsagent.js:3776:22)
error: ⨯ ○ repackage-android: COMMAND: 
jarsigner -keystore /app/current/keystore/keystore.jks -storepass ********* /tmp/repackager-9dXbZB/app-release.aab ********* 
FAILED with ERROR: 
jarsigner error: java.lang.RuntimeException: keystore load: toDerInputStream rejects tag type 107
Error: Command failed with exit code 1: jarsigner -keystore /app/current/keystore/keystore.jks -storepass ********* /tmp/repackager-9dXbZB/app-release.aab *********
jarsigner error: java.lang.RuntimeException: keystore load: toDerInputStream rejects tag type 107
 at makeError (/app/current/node_modules/execa/lib/error.js:60:11)
 at handlePromise (/app/current/node_modules/execa/index.js:118:26)
 at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:105:5)
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ ⨯ SUMMARY | 4/23/2025, 1:40:14 AM | rnv@1.3.0-feat-old-overrides.0
│ $ npx rnv repackage-android -p android -s standalone_bundle -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn --offline --templates-path /orchestra-cache/4.12.236/ejected_templates --aapt2-path /app/aapt2/aapt2
│ warn: You have integration @sba-runtime/integration-builder defined, but it wasn't found in package.json. ERR: Error: Cannot find module '../renative.json'
Require stack:
- ./node_modules/@sba-runtime/integration-builder/lib/config.js
- ./node_modules/@sba-runtime/integration-builder/lib/tasks/taskExport.js
- ./node_modules/@sba-runtime/integration-builder/lib/index.js
- ./node_modules/@rnv/core/lib/modules/index.js
│ error: ⨯ ○ repackage-android: COMMAND: 
jarsigner -keystore /app/current/keystore/keystore.jks -storepass ********* /tmp/repackager-9dXbZB/app-release.aab ********* 
FAILED with ERROR: 
jarsigner error: java.lang.RuntimeException: keystore load: toDerInputStream rejects tag type 107
Error: Command failed with exit code 1: jarsigner -keystore /app/current/keystore/keystore.jks -storepass ********* /tmp/repackager-9dXbZB/app-release.aab *********
jarsigner error: java.lang.RuntimeException: keystore load: toDerInputStream rejects tag type 107
 at makeError (/app/current/node_modules/execa/lib/error.js:60:11)
 at handlePromise (/app/current/node_modules/execa/index.js:118:26)
 at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:105:5)
│ Project location: ./platformBuilds/standalone_android │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

 

#appbuilder #error

entry.title: Unable to Create Mobile Application in SAP Build – "Not Subscribed" Message
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm currently following the tutorial "Create Your First MDK Application"  Create Your First MDK Application | SAP Tutorials on SAP BTP.
When I try to create a new application in SAP Build  (first step of Start Your MDK Application in the Editor Task, I see that the "Mobile" application type is not selectable and shows a message stating "Not Subscribed."

I'm using a trial subaccount, and I have already created an instance of Mobile Services and generated the service key. However, it seems that the Mobile Application type in SAP Build is not available due to the subscription status.

Could anyone clarify:

  • What exact subscription is required to enable the Mobile application type in SAP Build?

  • Is it available in trial accounts, or only in productive environments?

  • Are there any additional configurations or entitlements needed?

Thanks in advance for your help!
Davide Bruno

entry.title: Unable to integrate SAP Build Apps using BTP destination- Getting Connection failed error.
entry.content:
Hi,

I am unable to integrate SAP Build apps with BTP destination. Getting "Connection failed" error.

Thank you for help in advance

entry.title: "IMPORT FAILED" error - Can't import project from Build Apps standard plan
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We upgraded from Build Apps free plan to Build Apps standard plan following this: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/upgrade-to-sap-build-apps-standard-edition?q=import

We had 56 projects in the free plan, that we exported as recommended in order to import them back to Build Apps standard plan once installed.

However, instead of having 0 project in the brand new standard plan like in the tutorial video, we noticed that 19 projects were already listed there. We tried to import a project but we keep having the following error message (despite the fact the so called project is NOT in the project list of the Build lobby):

IMPORT FAILED
Project eu10.yjdhdjdj… already exists
Correlation Id: 748h67….

We saw the following note but unless mistaken it seems to suggest no solution: https://me.sap.com/notes/0003521702

Just contacted SAP Support about it but if anyone of you knows how to fix this, that would be really appreciated.

Thanks,

BR,

LM.

entry.title: configuration of the ABAP Cloud in SAP Build abap fullstack
entry.content:
Hi

Follow the guide at the link

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/setting-up-the-configuration-of-the-abap-cloud-in-sap-build/bc-p/14084904#M180924

When creating a project from SAP Build ABAP FullStack, the packages are not loaded.

Do you know what could be missing here?

Thanks!
